about.title: About Me
about.intro: Hi there! I'm a full-stack developer passionate about building elegant and practical web applications.
about.introDetail: Currently focused on frontend engineering, the React ecosystem, and Node.js backend development. I love solving real-world problems through code and enjoy the process of learning new technologies.
about.contactDesc: If you'd like to collaborate or just say hello, feel free to reach out through the following channels.
